requirement_topic.en: EMC Testing — LIBNOR National Standards (NL Series) for Radio/Telecom Equipment
requirement_topic.zh: EMC测试 — LIBNOR国家标准（NL系列，无线/电信设备）
requirement_topic.zht: EMC測試 — LIBNOR國家標準（NL系列，無線/電信設備）

summary.en: Electromagnetic compatibility (EMC) for wireless and telecom terminal equipment in Lebanon is governed by LIBNOR national standards (NL series), which are broadly aligned with ETSI and IEC international standards. EMC test reports are a required component of the TRA type approval technical file under Telecom Law 431/2002. LIBNOR (Lebanese Standards Institution — مؤسسة المقاييس اللبنانية) is the national standards body responsible for publishing NL standards. Test reports from internationally accredited laboratories (e.g., ILAC-accredited) to ETSI EN 301 489 series or equivalent NL/IEC standards are accepted as the technical basis for TRA type approval EMC review. Lebanon does not operate a standalone LIBNOR conformity mark scheme equivalent to CE marking for market placement; conformity is assessed as part of the TRA type approval process. French-language and Arabic-language test summary documentation is preferred.
summary.zh: 黎巴嫩无线及电信终端设备的电磁兼容性（EMC）由LIBNOR国家标准（NL系列）管理，该系列与ETSI和IEC国际标准总体一致。依据《电信法》431/2002，EMC测试报告是TRA型号认证技术档案的必要组成部分。LIBNOR（مؤسسة المقاييس اللبنانية）是负责发布NL标准的国家标准机构。经国际认可实验室（如ILAC认可）依据ETSI EN 301 489系列或等效NL/IEC标准出具的测试报告，可作为TRA型号认证EMC审查的技术依据。黎巴嫩没有独立的LIBNOR合规标志方案相当于CE标志；合规性作为TRA型号认证程序的一部分进行评估。建议提供法语和阿拉伯语测试摘要文件。
summary.zht: 黎巴嫩無線及電信終端設備的電磁相容性（EMC）由LIBNOR國家標準（NL系列）管理，該系列與ETSI和IEC國際標準總體一致。依據《電信法》431/2002，EMC測試報告是TRA型號認證技術檔案的必要組成部分。LIBNOR（مؤسسة المقاييس اللبنانية）是負責發布NL標準的國家標準機構。經國際認可實驗室（如ILAC認可）依據ETSI EN 301 489系列或等效NL/IEC標準出具的測試報告，可作為TRA型號認證EMC審查的技術依據。黎巴嫩沒有獨立的LIBNOR合規標誌方案相當於CE標誌；合規性作為TRA型號認證程序的一部分進行評估。建議提供法語和阿拉伯語測試摘要文件。

standards_or_laws: Lebanon Telecom Law 431/2002 (TRA type approval technical file requirement)
LIBNOR NL standards (EMC series, aligned with ETSI EN 301 489 series)
ETSI EN 301 489-1 (EMC common requirements for radio equipment)
ETSI EN 301 489-17 (EMC for broadband data transmission systems incl. Wi-Fi)

summary.en: In China, EMC for wireless and telecom devices is primarily governed by GB/T 9254 (Class B emissions) and GB/T 17618 (immunity) under the CCC mandatory certification system for in-scope products. SRRC radio type approval also involves RF-related technical review. CCC and GB EMC standards are China-specific and are not recognised by LIBNOR or TRA as substitutes for NL/ETSI-aligned test reports.
summary.zh: 在中国，无线及电信设备的EMC主要由CCC强制认证体系下的GB/T 9254（B类发射）和GB/T 17618（抗扰度）管理。SRRC无线电型号认证也涉及射频相关技术审查。CCC和GB EMC标准为中国特有标准，不被LIBNOR或TRA承认为NL/ETSI对接测试报告的替代。
summary.zht: 在中國，無線及電信設備的EMC主要由CCC強制認證體系下的GB/T 9254（B類發射）和GB/T 17618（抗擾度）管理。SRRC無線電型號認證也涉及射頻相關技術審查。CCC和GB EMC標準為中國特有標準，不被LIBNOR或TRA承認為NL/ETSI對接測試報告的替代。

standards_or_laws: GB/T 9254 (EMC emissions — Class B ITE, China)
CCC mandatory certification (EMC component for in-scope products)

gap.en: Chinese CCC/GB EMC test reports are not accepted by TRA or LIBNOR as substitutes for NL/ETSI-aligned test reports. A fresh set of EMC test reports from an internationally accredited laboratory to ETSI EN 301 489 series or equivalent NL standards must be submitted as part of the TRA type approval application. CE-basis ETSI test reports from accredited EU labs are generally accepted as the technical basis by TRA, but TRA makes its own conformity determination. French/Arabic test summary documentation is preferred.
gap.zh: 中国CCC/GB EMC测试报告不被TRA或LIBNOR接受为NL/ETSI对接测试报告的替代。须从国际认可实验室获取符合ETSI EN 301 489系列或等效NL标准的全新EMC测试报告，作为TRA型号认证申请的一部分提交。基于CE的ETSI测试报告（来自经认可欧盟实验室）通常被TRA接受作为技术依据，但TRA自行作出合规裁定。建议提供法语/阿拉伯语测试摘要文件。
gap.zht: 中國CCC/GB EMC測試報告不被TRA或LIBNOR接受為NL/ETSI對接測試報告的替代。須從國際認可實驗室獲取符合ETSI EN 301 489系列或等效NL標準的全新EMC測試報告，作為TRA型號認證申請的一部分提交。基於CE的ETSI測試報告（來自經認可歐盟實驗室）通常被TRA接受作為技術依據，但TRA自行作出合規裁定。建議提供法語/阿拉伯語測試摘要文件。

source.publisher: LIBNOR — Lebanese Standards Institution (مؤسسة المقاييس اللبنانية)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] EMC test reports to LIBNOR NL standards (aligned with ETSI EN 301 489 series) from an internationally accredited laboratory are mandatory as part of the TRA type approval technical file under Telecom Law 431/2002. Chinese CCC/GB EMC reports are not accepted substitutes. CE-basis ETSI test reports may be submitted as a technical basis.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 依据《电信法》431/2002，国际认可实验室出具的LIBNOR NL标准（与ETSI EN 301 489系列对接）EMC测试报告作为TRA型号认证技术档案的组成部分为强制要求。中国CCC/GB EMC报告不可作为替代。基于CE的ETSI测试报告可作为技术依据提交。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 依據《電信法》431/2002，國際認可實驗室出具的LIBNOR NL標準（與ETSI EN 301 489系列對接）EMC測試報告作為TRA型號認證技術檔案的組成部分為強制要求。中國CCC/GB EMC報告不可作為替代。基於CE的ETSI測試報告可作為技術依據提交。

requirement_topic.en: Radio Spectrum Parameters — Lebanon Frequency Plan and TRA Spectrum Licensing
requirement_topic.zh: 无线电频谱参数 — 黎巴嫩频率计划与TRA频谱许可
requirement_topic.zht: 無線電頻譜參數 — 黎巴嫩頻率計劃與TRA頻譜許可

summary.en: Radio devices must operate within frequency bands and power limits permitted under Lebanon's national frequency plan as administered by TRA. The 2.4 GHz (802.11b/g/n/ax) and 5 GHz (802.11a/n/ac/ax) Wi-Fi bands are generally permitted for indoor use under TRA type approval conditions. Bluetooth (2.4 GHz ISM) and LoRa/sub-GHz operation must be confirmed against the Lebanon frequency plan and TRA-issued spectrum conditions. Devices transmitting on frequency bands not allocated for unlicensed use in Lebanon require individual spectrum authorisation from TRA in addition to type approval. Cellular bands must align with Lebanese network operator spectrum allocations (primarily Touch and Alfa). Power limits for unlicensed bands must comply with TRA-specified values, which may differ from Chinese SRRC or European ETSI limits.
summary.zh: 无线电设备必须在TRA管理的黎巴嫩国家频率计划所允许的频段和功率限值范围内运行。2.4 GHz（802.11b/g/n/ax）和5 GHz（802.11a/n/ac/ax）Wi-Fi频段通常在TRA型号认证条件下允许室内使用。蓝牙（2.4 GHz ISM）和LoRa/亚GHz运行须依据黎巴嫩频率计划和TRA颁发的频谱条件予以确认。在黎巴嫩未分配用于非授权使用的频段上发射的设备，除型号认证外，还须从TRA取得单独的频谱授权。蜂窝频段必须与黎巴嫩网络运营商（主要为Touch和Alfa）的频谱分配一致。非授权频段的功率限值须符合TRA规定值，可能与中国SRRC或欧洲ETSI限值不同。
summary.zht: 無線電裝置必須在TRA管理的黎巴嫩國家頻率計劃所允許的頻段和功率限值範圍內運行。2.4 GHz（802.11b/g/n/ax）和5 GHz（802.11a/n/ac/ax）Wi-Fi頻段通常在TRA型號認證條件下允許室內使用。藍牙（2.4 GHz ISM）和LoRa/亞GHz運行須依據黎巴嫩頻率計劃和TRA頒發的頻譜條件予以確認。在黎巴嫩未分配用於非授權使用的頻段上發射的裝置，除型號認證外，還須從TRA取得單獨的頻譜授權。蜂窩頻段必須與黎巴嫩網路運營商（主要為Touch和Alfa）的頻譜分配一致。非授權頻段的功率限值須符合TRA規定值，可能與中國SRRC或歐洲ETSI限值不同。

standards_or_laws: ITU Radio Regulations (Region 1 — Lebanon is ITU Region 1)
ETSI EN 300 328 (2.4 GHz power limits — used as technical reference)
ETSI EN 301 893 (5 GHz power limits — used as technical reference)

summary.en: In China, SRRC (State Radio Regulation of China) administers spectrum use and radio type approval. Chinese frequency allocations (2.4 GHz, 5 GHz) and SRRC power limits apply within China. SRRC approval does not confer any rights in Lebanon; the Lebanon national frequency plan and TRA conditions govern spectrum use, and power limits may differ from SRRC-approved values.
summary.zh: 在中国，国家无线电管理局（SRRC）负责管理频谱使用和无线电型号认证。中国频率分配（2.4 GHz、5 GHz）和SRRC功率限值适用于中国境内。SRRC批准不赋予任何在黎巴嫩的权利；黎巴嫩国家频率计划和TRA条件管理频谱使用，功率限值可能与SRRC批准值不同。
summary.zht: 在中國，國家無線電管理局（SRRC）負責管理頻譜使用和無線電型號認證。中國頻率分配（2.4 GHz、5 GHz）和SRRC功率限值適用於中國境內。SRRC批准不賦予任何在黎巴嫩的權利；黎巴嫩國家頻率計劃和TRA條件管理頻譜使用，功率限值可能與SRRC批准值不同。

standards_or_laws: MIIT SRRC Radio Type Approval (Regulations on Radio Administration)

gap.en: SRRC-approved frequency parameters and power limits are specific to China and are not automatically applicable in Lebanon. The Lebanon national frequency plan and TRA-issued spectrum conditions govern permitted bands and power limits for each device category. Exporters must verify that their device's operating frequencies, channel plans, and power levels comply with Lebanon TRA spectrum conditions before submitting a type approval application. Sub-GHz LoRa and cellular band compatibility with Lebanese operators (Touch, Alfa) must be confirmed separately.
gap.zh: SRRC批准的频率参数和功率限值仅适用于中国，不自动适用于黎巴嫩。黎巴嫩国家频率计划和TRA颁发的频谱条件管理每类设备的允许频段和功率限值。出口商在提交型号认证申请前，须验证其设备的工作频率、信道计划和功率等级符合黎巴嫩TRA频谱条件。亚GHz LoRa和蜂窝频段与黎巴嫩运营商（Touch、Alfa）的兼容性须单独确认。
gap.zht: SRRC批准的頻率參數和功率限值僅適用於中國，不自動適用於黎巴嫩。黎巴嫩國家頻率計劃和TRA頒發的頻譜條件管理每類裝置的允許頻段和功率限值。出口商在提交型號認證申請前，須驗證其裝置的工作頻率、信道計劃和功率等級符合黎巴嫩TRA頻譜條件。亞GHz LoRa和蜂窩頻段與黎巴嫩運營商（Touch、Alfa）的相容性須單獨確認。

source.publisher: TRA — Telecommunications Regulatory Authority (Lebanon / هيئة ناظمة للاتصالات)

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Radio devices imported into Lebanon must comply with the Lebanon national frequency plan and TRA-specified power limits as conditions of TRA type approval. SRRC-approved frequency parameters are not automatically valid in Lebanon. Sub-GHz LoRa and cellular band compatibility with Lebanese network operators must be separately verified.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 进口黎巴嫩的无线电设备须符合黎巴嫩国家频率计划和TRA规定的功率限值，作为TRA型号认证的条件。SRRC批准的频率参数不自动在黎巴嫩有效。亚GHz LoRa和蜂窝频段与黎巴嫩网络运营商的兼容性须单独核实。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 進口黎巴嫩的無線電裝置須符合黎巴嫩國家頻率計劃和TRA規定的功率限值，作為TRA型號認證的條件。SRRC批准的頻率參數不自動在黎巴嫩有效。亞GHz LoRa和蜂窩頻段與黎巴嫩網路運營商的相容性須單獨核實。
